inputs.label: Consultant Daily Rate
inputs.businessContext: The base daily rate charged by the consultant.

businessContext_i18n.en: The base daily rate charged by the consultant.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Danışman tarafından talep edilen temel günlük ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der vom Berater berechnete tägliche Basissatz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux journalier de base facturé par le consultant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa diaria base que cobra el consultor.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage added to cover administrative and operational overhead costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage added to cover administrative and operational overhead costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İdari ve operasyonel genel gider maliyetlerini karşılamak için eklenen yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz zur Deckung der administrativen und betrieblichen Gemeinkosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage ajouté pour couvrir les coûts administratifs et opérationnels.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje añadido para cubrir costos administrativos y operativos.

inputs.label: Profit Margin Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Target net profit margin desired on top of all costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target net profit margin desired on top of all costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm maliyetlerin üzerinde hedeflenen net kâr marjı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge bénéficiaire nette cible souhaitée par-dessus tous les coûts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de beneficio neto objetivo deseado sobre todos los costos.

inputs.label: Days Worked
inputs.businessContext: Total number of working days for the consulting engagement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of working days for the consulting engagement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Danışmanlık sözleşmesi için toplam çalışma günü sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Arbeitstage für das Beratungsprojekt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de jours ouvrables pour la mission de conseil.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de días laborables para el compromiso de consultoría.

inputs.label: Additional Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Any extra reimbursable expenses such as travel, accommodation, or materials.

businessContext_i18n.en: Any extra reimbursable expenses such as travel, accommodation, or materials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahat, konaklama veya malzeme gibi geri ödenebilir ekstra masraflar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche erstattungsfähige Ausgaben wie Reise, Unterkunft oder Material.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tout frais remboursable supplémentaire tel que déplacement, hébergement ou matériel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier gasto reembolsable extra como viajes, alojamiento o materiales.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: VAT or other applicable consumption tax rate on the final invoice amount.

businessContext_i18n.en: VAT or other applicable consumption tax rate on the final invoice amount.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai fatura tutarı üzerinden KDV veya uygulanabilir diğer tüketim vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mehrwertsteuer oder andere anwendbare Verbrauchssteuer auf den Rechnungsendbetrag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de TVA ou autre taxe à la consommation applicable sur le montant final de la facture.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de IVA u otro impuesto al consumo aplicable sobre el monto final de la factura.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
